subject: English
overall_learning_objectives: Understand the story ‘Travel’ and its main events
Identify the narrator and other characters
Learn about different modes of travel
Recognize simple lessons about planning and exploration
Develop reading comprehension and vocabulary skills

lesson_plan.title: Introduction to Travel
teaching_strategy: Class discussion on students’ travel experiences
student_activities: Share experiences of a short trip or travel
Predict what the story might involve

lesson_plan.title: Reading the Beginning
student_activities: List the characters and describe them briefly

lesson_plan.title: Journey Details
teaching_strategy: Teacher asks students to visualize journey
student_activities: Draw a simple map of the journey

lesson_plan.title: Problem Solving and Teamwork
topics_covered: Teamwork or planning used to overcome problems
student_activities: Explain how the problem could be solved

lesson_plan.title: Lessons and Reflections
topics_covered: What the narrator learned from the travel
Moral and takeaways of the story
student_activities: Write the moral of the story

lesson_plan.title: Language and Revision
student_activities: Form compound words from the list
Complete conditional sentences related to travel

teacher_tip: Encourage students to share personal travel experiences and relate them to the story events.
